records.question: Which molecules have atoms with element equal to 'zn' and also have bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'zn'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
  FROM atom a
  WHERE a.element = 'zn'
)
AND m.molecule_id IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
  FROM bond b
)

records.question: What molecules with a label of + contain bromine atoms?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE atom.element = 'br' AND molecule.label = '+'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '+' AND a.element = 'Br'

records.question: Which molecules that have at least one atom with element equal to 'na' and at least one bond also have the label equal to '-'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'na'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label = '-'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM atom a
  WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  AND a.element = 'na'
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM bond b
  WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
)

records.question: Which molecules have a label that is '-' and contain atoms where the element is exactly 'na'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND atom.element = 'na'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '-' AND a.element = 'na'

records.question: Which molecules have a label of '-' and contain phosphorus atoms connected by single bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND atom.element = 'p'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label = '-'
AND m.molecule_id IN (
  SELECT a.molecule_id
  FROM atom a
  WHERE a.element = 'phosphorus'
  AND a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT c.atom_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
    AND c.atom_id IN (
      SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'phosphorus'
    )
    AND c.atom_id2 IN (
      SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'phosphorus'
    )
  )
)

records.question: Which molecules have a negative label and contain carbon atoms connected by triple bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '#' AND atom.element = 'c' AND molecule.label = '-'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label LIKE '-%'
  AND m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
    JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C'
      AND a2.element = 'C'
      AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
      AND a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
  )

records.question: Which molecules contain bonds that are exactly triple bonds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '#'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'

records.question: What molecules have a label exactly '-' and contain bonds where the bond type is exactly '-' with atoms whose element is exactly 'f'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT molecule.molecule_id FROM molecule
JOIN atom ON molecule.molecule_id = atom.molecule_id
JOIN bond ON molecule.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = '-' AND bond.bond_type = '-' AND atom.element = 'f'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.label = '-'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM bond b
  WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
  AND b.bond_type = '-'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM connected c
    WHERE c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    AND (
      EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM atom a
        WHERE a.atom_id = c.atom_id
        AND a.element = 'f'
      )
      OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM atom a
        WHERE a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
        AND a.element = 'f'
      )
    )
  )
)
